You are working on the pinterest/ktlint repository.
The codebase is at version 0.50 (commit: ce93a6db).

## Issue to Resolve

No spacing around colon in annotation
Spacing should not be allowed around the colon in annotation and annotation entries regardless of the annotation target

```
@file:JvmName("Foo") // allowed
@file :JvmName("Foo") // disallowed
@file: JvmName("Foo") // disallowed
@file : JvmName("Foo") // disallowed

@set:[Inject VisibleForTesting] // allowed
@set :[Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
@set: [Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
@set : [Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
```

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/SpacingAroundColonRule.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

content.text:
Perfect! Let me provide a summary of the changes made to fix the issue.

## Summary

I've successfully implemented the fix for the issue "No spacing around colon in annotation". Here's what was done:

### Changes Made

**1. Modified `SpacingAroundColonRule.kt`** (`/project/ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/SpacingAroundColonRule.kt`):

- Replaced the early return statement that was skipping annotation spacing checks with a call to a new function
- Added a new private function `emitAnnotationSpacingViolations` that:
  - Checks for and reports whitespace before the colon
  - Checks for and reports whitespace after the colon
  - Provides auto-correction by removing the whitespace when detected

**2. Created comprehensive test coverage** (`/project/ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/test/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/SpacingAroundColonRuleAnnotationTest.kt`):

Test coverage for all scenarios mentioned in the issue:
- `@file:JvmName("Foo")` - allowed (no violations)
- `@file :JvmName("Foo")` - disallowed (violation: spacing before colon)
- `@file: JvmName("Foo")` - disallowed (violation: spacing after colon)
- `@file : JvmName("Foo")` - disallowed (violations: spacing before and after colon)
- `@set:[Inject VisibleForTesting]` - allowed (no violations)
- `@set :[Inject VisibleForTesting]` - disallowed (violation: spacing before colon)
- `@set: [Inject VisibleForTesting]` - disallowed (violation: spacing after colon)
- `@set : [Inject VisibleForTesting]` - disallowed (violations: spacing before and after colon)

### Root Cause

The original code had a TODO comment referencing issue #2093 and was returning early without enforcing any spacing rules for annotations. This meant that spacing around colons in annotations was not being linted at all.

### Fix Implementation

The fix enforces that colons in annotations and annotation entries must have no whitespace before or after them. This matches the Kotlin coding conventions and addresses the requirement described in the issue.

### Test Results

- ✅ All new tests pass
- ✅ All existing `SpacingAroundColonRuleTest` tests pass
- ✅ All standard ruleset tests pass

The implementation is minimal, targeted, and maintains backward compatibility with existing functionality while adding the requested annotation spacing enforcement.
